$comment: Eliza-1 bundle EXTRAS (WS10 prep, 2026-05-13).
These artifacts are NOT part of the base-v1 release bundle described by
ELIZA_1_GGUF_PLATFORM_PLAN.json. They are runtime-downloaded add-ons that
the runtime / arbiter pulls on demand the first time a capability is
requested. Their presence in the user's local cache is gated by:
(a) the device class meeting the resident-RAM headroom budget in
docs/eliza-1-pipeline/05-memory-budgets.md, and
(b) the user opting in to the capability (image-gen, OCR, person-detect)
via the desktop/mobile setup flow.
DO NOT add these as required_files on the bundle plan: shipping a 4 GB
diffusion GGUF inside the base-v1 bundle would push the 0_8b/2b tiers far
beyond their advertised on-disk footprint and break first-run UX on phones.
The validator (eliza/scripts/validate-bundle-plan.mjs) reads this file
alongside ELIZA_1_GGUF_PLATFORM_PLAN.json and asserts every per-tier entry
has a corresponding catalog entry in
eliza/packages/shared/src/local-inference/catalog.ts (or surfaces the gap
as a WS2 / WS3 follow-up).
Image-gen GGUFs ride on stable-diffusion.cpp (or a comparable
GGUF-aware diffusion runtime). Sizes are estimates from public
GGUF quants of each model:
- sdxl-turbo Q4_0:    ~3.6 GB
- z-image-turbo Q4_K_M: ~3.4 GB (Apache-2.0)
- flux-1-schnell Q4_K_M: ~6.8 GB (Apache-2.0 weights, Schnell only)

optional.gateNote: Flagship phones / mid-range tablets only. Skip on <8 GB RAM.
Higher quality, requires >=24 GB unified RAM or >=12 GB VRAM.
Higher quality, requires >=24 GB unified RAM or >=12 GB VRAM.
Long-context tier; image-gen is co-resident with the 27B text weights — flagship workstations only.
1M-context tier; image-gen is rarely co-resident — server / multi-GPU only.

$comment: Vision mmproj entries are already listed per tier in
ELIZA_1_GGUF_PLATFORM_PLAN.json under required_files
(vision/mmproj-<tier>.gguf). This block records the size estimates so
the budget table and arbiter can plan resident memory.
Estimates are for Qwen3-VL mmproj at the per-tier matching quant.
OCR ships with the app, not the model bundle. RapidOCR PP-OCRv5 mobile
(detector + recognizer ONNX) is bundled by the desktop installer and
linked into the runtime workspace at first launch. Total resident
footprint is ~80 MB (det ~5 MB, rec ~75 MB).
Lightweight person/object detector for camera-to-reaction flows.
YOLOv8n / YOLOv11n at int8 ONNX is ~12 MB; ships with the app like OCR.

quantization.$comment: Image-gen quant config sidecar that mirrors the per-tier defaults.
